thought.text: The manual's question seems quite straightforward - "Which gas do plants release into the air during photosynthesis?" It's a simple, one-word answer that I should be able to recall easily. This reminds me of my knowledge about oxygen production in plant cells; it's a fundamental concept in biology. The fact that it's a single-word answer makes me wonder if there might be some nuances or exceptions to this general rule...
